name: cymor-movie-api
description: Production-ready backend API powering Cymor Movie Hub — a premium streaming platform for movies, TV series, and anime.

scripts.setup:python: PYO3_USE_ABI3_FORWARD_COMPATIBILITY=1 pip install 'pydantic==2.9.2' 'pydantic-core==2.23.4' --no-build-isolation --break-system-packages && pip install moviebox-api --no-deps --break-system-packages && pip install rich click bs4 httpx throttlebuster --break-system-packages

author: Legendary Smiley Cymor <cymortechservices@gmail.com>
